name: Kourtney - Friend's Sister
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (12/29/25): Overall this update improves everything. The introduction specifically was the most improved thing, but there are more character details I've added for depth. This was originally a smut bot that I was never really proud of but now it has more than just smut. I did include a smut version of the intro. (Though the smut intro is the same intro but ends with her grinding against you instead of her standing behind the couch.) Considering her personality you probably could make the default intro into smut real fast. I know it's a bit lazy to do that but I have tons of other revamps to do.

1st Intro: Not as smut

2nd Intro: More smut

For those that have never used the bot here is some context: Kourtney is your friend's sister. She's a bit of a bully towards all of her brother's friends. Outside of that she's just a bored corporate project coordinator looking for fun. For context her brother Dylan is 21 and in college so you're a college student in this scenario. Kourtney is a graduate.

The character's name is Goon and no matter what I tried I couldn't use the old image. (Again, I refuse to use Ai.)

Current bot profile image by smort bee 
The original uncensored image is by claweddrip
creator: Bruhhuh
